description: Private equity downside-risk scoring rubric for investment committee gating.

dimension_definitions.leverage_debt_service: Capital structure resilience under base and downside cases. Inputs: leverage, interest coverage, covenant headroom.
dimension_definitions.revenue_quality: Durability and concentration risk of revenue base. Inputs: recurring share, NRR, top customer exposure, churn.
dimension_definitions.earnings_quality: Reliability of EBITDA and cash conversion. Inputs: QoE adjustments, FCF conversion, working capital volatility, capex burden.
dimension_definitions.market_operational: Exposure to cyclicality and operating fragility. Inputs: end-market cyclicality, supplier concentration, pricing power.
dimension_definitions.legal_regulatory: Exposure to litigation, investigations, and compliance constraints.
dimension_definitions.management_governance: Team stability and quality of finance control environment.
dimension_definitions.value_creation_execution: Execution risk in the value creation plan and integration complexity.
